subject: [DCAE] Add secrets as envs to application container in dcaegen2
commit_message:
[DCAE] Add secrets as envs to application container in dcaegen2

Mount app-config-input configmap directly to app container.

Signed-off-by: Bartosz Gardziejewski <bartosz.gardziejewski@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I50d80adcb87e86241876c9bab669739cb3d9c10c
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2630

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2276/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2276/ )
